message:
feat: make TwoTierIndex robust for empty indices and dynamically source SSH probe paths

Two-tier search: wrap FsTwoTierIndex in Option so that empty indices
(zero documents) no longer create a pointless file-backed index that
can trigger page faults. All search methods now early-return when the
index is None, eliminating unnecessary I/O for empty datasets.

SSH probe script: replace the hardcoded agent detection path list with
dynamic paths sourced from franken_agent_detection::default_probe_paths_tilde().
This ensures new connectors (amp, clawdbot, factory, vibe, windsurf, goose,
continue) are automatically included in SSH probes without manual sync.
Also escape awk/bash format strings with double braces for Rust format!()
compatibility, and extend infer_agent_type() to cover all new agent slugs.

Includes tests verifying probe script contains all detection paths and
infer_agent_type handles all dynamic agents.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
